author: Niche Gamer
text:
Genshin Impact Version Luna VIII update launches in July Developer miHoYo has announced the next update for Genshin Impact launching next month, bringing with it a new character, a new expansion, and more. The new Luna VIII update, titled “Song of the Welkin Moon: Scherzo – Sunny Summer Fontinalia”, is launching for all platforms earlier next month, on July 1st. Here’s a full rundown on […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Grand Theft Auto VI reveals preorders and official cover art Rockstar Games has revealed preorders and the official cover art for Grand Theft Auto VI this morning. Grand Theft Auto VI preorders are launching next week for both Xbox Series X|S and PlayStation 5, on June 25th. The long-awaited sequel is finally set to launch this fall, on November 19th for Xbox and PlayStation. Here’s a […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas announced for PC and consoles Publisher Outright Games and developer Casual Brothers in collaboration with Dr. Seuss Enterprises have announced The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas, a new adventure game sequel inspired by the classic books. The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas is in development for Windows PC (via Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch, PS4, and PS5 with a release set for September 18th. “We’re thrilled to bring […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Dispatch addresses Switch censorship in “HR Violations” update AdHoc Studio released a new update for DISPATCH that mostly focuses on censorship settings in their superhero comedy game. When DISPATCH first launched for the hybrid Nintendo handheld, it had naughty bits covered up in the game, while its PC and PS5 versions were completely uncensored.  The new update will let Switch and Switch 2 users enjoy […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Tomo: Endless Blue adds Switch 2 version to 2026 release After a smashing Kickstarter success, indie developer Onibi has announced a Switch 2 version for Tomo: Endless Blue, their cute anime-themed creature-collecting action RPG. Tomo: Endless Blue is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 alongside its previously announced Windows PC (Steam) version sometime later in 2026. The game is still running a Kickstarter campaign and has […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Street Fighter 6 DLC character Yasmine launches in August Capcom announced Street Fighter 6 DLC character Yasmine is launching in August. The first of the game’s Year 4 DLC characters will launch on August 3rd for all platforms. Future characters include Arjun in fall, guest character Tifa in early 2027, and finally Bosch in 2027. Here’s a rundown on the new fighter, plus a new gameplay […]
